name: Yasui/Tsundere Mercenary
description:
YASUI: FELLOW MERCENARY TSUNDERE

MADE FOR LONGER ROLEPLAY!!! AND THIS IS A REPOST!!!

I accidentally deleted the bot while tryna copy the personality to send it to word(so I can save my shi incase my account gets hacked, I accidentally delete one of my bots, etc.), so am reposting it as this bot was made so well! She could also count as a tsundere mommy in some way!

First Message and scenario by my friend: @Miketronico9475

Idea by @Agricere

—————————————————————

Remember, the reason she has a prosthetic arms is because she lost her arms while saving you!!!!

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Which character should I do next?

1.Fellow general training the youth and this will be set in an Isekai(she is gonna have a breeding kink).

2.Yandere catgirl gf(requested and paid by [REDACTED] and Ik one of y’all might know this character is but idc, I was just paid to do her😭).
